biological_replicate: female, six-to-eight-week-old, specific-pathogen-free (SPF) BALB/c mice were obtained...
technical_replicate: replicate one and replicate two of RH strain, respectively.
experimental_design: Here, we compare the acetylomes of genotype 1 (RH strain) and Chinese 1 genotype (ToxoDB#9, PYS strain) of T. gondii.
factor_value: For example, genotype I is highly virulent, whereas genotype II and genotype III are less virulent. Moreover, Chinese 1 genotype (ToxoDB#9) is also virulent.
number_of_technical_replicates: replicate one and replicate two of RH strain.
number_of_biological_replicates: Two biological replicates were prepared for each parasite strain.
number_of_samples: 6 biological replicates described (2 for each of the 3 strains).
